title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Dadan, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 8–11.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Dadan, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...is also a part of this kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: It's that damn trio of kids again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Don't let those three brats get away!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo... it's really you!! Wait right there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: You're alive?! I don't believe it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: You have to come back home!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ...?! Hey, SABO!! Someone's calling for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I mean, we're four stories up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have to be honest because I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're the ones who wanted to know!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Dadan, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.
